subject: Sprint Review Reminder – Friday, March 5 at 2pm
body:
Hi team,

Quick reminder that our Sprint Review meeting is scheduled for this Friday, March 5 at 2:00 PM.

**Meeting Details:**
Zoom Link: https://company.zoom.us/j/[meeting-id]?pwd=[passcode]
(The actual link has been sent separately to your calendars)

**What to Expect:**
We'll be reviewing completed work from the sprint and gathering feedback from stakeholders. This is a collaborative session where we showcase what the team accomplished.

**Action Items for Team Leads:**
Please prepare demo segments for your features/areas. Keep demos focused and time-boxed—we recommend 10-15 minutes per demo including Q&A. If you have incomplete items, be ready to discuss them briefly.

If you have any questions about your demo segment, reach out to the Product Owner or Scrum Master.

Looking forward to celebrating this sprint's progress!

Best,
Internal Communications
